user.title: Set up IP Ban Manager
user.description: Choose safe default allowlist entries and initial automatic ban settings.

error.invalid_ip_address: Enter valid IP addresses, CIDR networks, or IPv4 wildcard networks like 192.168.1.*.
error.unsafe_allowlist_network: That allowlist entry would trust every IP address and effectively disable IP banning.

abort.unsafe_allowlist_network: The imported allowlist contains an entry that would trust every IP address.

init.title: Manage IP Ban Manager
init.description: Manage the live allowlist and ban list. Submit applies changes immediately; no Home Assistant restart is needed.

allowed_ips.name: Allowed IPs
allowed_ips.description: Trusted IP addresses or networks that should never be banned. Use one entry per line. CIDR and IPv4 wildcard networks like 192.168.1.* are supported.

error.invalid_ip_address: Enter valid IP addresses, CIDR networks, or IPv4 wildcard networks like 192.168.1.*.
error.invalid_banned_ip: Enter only exact IP addresses in the banned IP list. Wildcards and CIDR networks are only supported for allowed IPs.
error.unsafe_allowlist_network: That allowlist entry would trust every IP address and effectively disable IP banning.
error.banned_ip_allowlisted: An IP cannot be both allowed and banned. Remove it from one list and try again.

invalid_ip_address.message: {ip_address} is not a valid IP address.

invalid_network.message: {network} is not a valid IP address, CIDR network, or IPv4 wildcard network.

ip_address_allowlisted.message: {ip_address} is allowlisted, so it was not banned.

unsafe_allowlist_network.message: {network} would trust every IP address and effectively disable IP banning.

network_contains_banned_ip.message: {network} contains one or more currently banned IP addresses. Remove those bans before allowlisting this network.

clear_all_ip_bans_confirmation_required.message: Set confirm to true before clearing every IP ban.

ip_ban_disabled.title: Enable Home Assistant IP banning
ip_ban_disabled.description:
IP Ban Manager needs Home Assistant's built-in HTTP IP banning to be enabled before it can manage bans or apply the allowlist.

Add this to `configuration.yaml`, then restart Home Assistant:

```yaml
http:
  ip_ban_enabled: true
  login_attempts_threshold: 5
```

If you already have an `http:` section, add those two keys inside the existing section.
